ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER OF CARL ZEISS MEDITEC, INC. TO COMPLAINT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CARL ZEISS MEDITEC, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT FOR VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE 1738.10 ET SEQ. IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. SECTION 1738.13(A) AND REILLY. INQUEST TECHNOLOGY INC. (2013) 218 CAL. APP, 4TH 536 ESTABLISH THAT THE WHOLESALE SALES REPRESENTATIVE STATUTE ONLY APPLIES TO TRANSACTIONS IN CALIFORNIA. BECAUSE PLAINTIFF FOCUS MEDICAL GROUP, INC. DOES NOT ALLEGE ANY CALIFORNIA SALES NOR DOES IT APPEAR THAT IT CAN ALLEGE ANY CALIFORNIA SALES, THE STATUTE IS INAPPLICABLE. THE PARTIES' CHOICE OF LAW AGREEMENT DOES NOT MAKE AN INAPPLICABLE STATUTE APPLICABLE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2017 Continued To Nov-13-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Set For Trial On Aug-14-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Hogue of Greenberg Traurig, LLP telephone number 415-655-1303 for Defendant Carl Zeiss.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CARL ZEISS MEDITEC, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, as to the third cause of action in the complaint for violation of Civil Code 1738.10 et seq. is sustained without leave to amend. Section 1738.13(a) and Reilly. Inquest Technology Inc. (2013) 218 Cal. App, 4th 536 establish that the Wholesale Sales Representative statute only applies to transactions in California. Because plaintiff Focus Medical Group, Inc. does not allege any California sales nor does it appear that it can allege any California sales, the statute is inapplicable. The parties' choice of law agreement does not make an inapplicable statute applicable. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Continued To Oct-24-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
